scriptLines:
query: 'SELECT
lds.Division
,EOMONTH(lds.EntryDate) as EntryMonth
,cst.Zip
,lds.LeadSubSourceID
,lds.ProductID
,lds.BranchID
,count(distinct lds.LeadID) as LeadCount
,count(distinct lds.CustomerID) as ProspectCount
,sum(case when lds.ApptSet = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as ApptSet
,sum(case when lds.NetIssued = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as NetIssue
,sum(case when lds.Sat = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as Demo
,sum(case when lds.Sold = 'True' then 1 else 0 end) as Sold
,sum(case 
    when jsc.JobStatusCategory is NULL then 0
    when jsc.JobStatusCategory in ('Cancelled', 'Credit Decline') then 0
    else 1
end) as NetSold
,sum(case 
    when jsc.JobStatusCategory is NULL then 0
    when jsc.JobStatusCategory in ('Cancelled') then 1
    else 0
end) as CancelledCount
,sum(case 
    when jsc.JobStatusCategory is NULL then 0
    when jsc.JobStatusCategory in ('Credit Decline') then 1
    else 0
end) as CreditDeclineCount
,sum(case 
    when jsc.JobStatusCategory is NULL then 0
    when jsc.JobStatusCategory in ('Cancelled', 'Credit Decline') then 0
    else job.GrossAmount
end) as NetSalesAmount
,sum(case 
    when jsc.JobStatusCategory is NULL then 0
    when jsc.JobStatusCategory in ('Cancelled') then job.GrossAmount
    else 0
end) as CancelledAmount
,sum(case 
    when jsc.JobStatusCategory is NULL then 0
    when jsc.JobStatusCategory in ('Credit Decline') then job.GrossAmount
    else 0
end) as CreditDeclineAmount
,sum(job.GrossAmount) as GrossSalesAmount
,count(distinct job.JobID) as JobCount
FROM 
[EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
inner join [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
on lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
left join [EDW].[DIM_BRANCH] brn
on lds.BranchID = brn.BranchID
left join [EDW].[DIM_PRODUCT] prd
on lds.ProductID = prd.ProductID
left join [EDW].[FACT_JOB] job
on lds.LeadID = job.LeadID
left join [EDW].[DIM_JOB_STATUS] jbs
on job.JobStatusID = jbs.JobStatusID
left join [EDW].[DIM_JOB_STATUS_CATEGORY] jsc
on jbs.JobStatusCategoryID = jsc.JobStatusCategoryID
WHERE
lds.EntryDate >= '2021-01-01'
group by 
lds.Division
,EOMONTH(lds.EntryDate)
,cst.Zip
,lds.LeadSubSourceID
,lds.ProductID
,lds.BranchID
',

query: 'SELECT
zip.[ZipCode]
,cast(max(zip.[HouseholdsPerZipCode]) as int) as HouseholdsPerZipCode
,cast(max(zip.[AverageHouseValue]) as int) as AverageHouseValue
,cast(max(zip.[IncomePerHousehold]) as int) as IncomePerHousehold
,cast(max(zip.[PopulationEstimate]) as int) as PopulationEstimate
,cast(max(zip.[MedianAge]) as decimal) as MedianAge
,max(zip.[City]) as City
,max(zip.[County]) as County
,max(zip.[CBSA_Name]) as CBSA_Name
,max(zip.[MSA_Name]) as MSA_Name
,max(zip.[State]) as [State]
 FROM [ODS].[MKTDATA_ZIP_CODES_DB_DELUXE_BUSINESS] zip
where 
PrimaryRecord = 'P'
group BY
zip.[ZipCode]',
